evals.prompt: I've never checked what AI chatbots say about my brand. How do I start?
evals.expected_output: A manual audit approach with prompt templates for checking brand mentions across multiple AI models

assertions.name: prompt_templates
assertions.description: Provides example prompts to ask AI models about the brand, covering areas like brand overview, reputation, or comparisons

assertions.name: multiple_models
assertions.description: Recommends checking more than one AI model, mentioning at least two of ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, or Gemini

assertions.name: tracking_method
assertions.description: Suggests a way to record or track findings over time, such as a spreadsheet or regular cadence

evals.prompt: Competitors show up in ChatGPT answers for our category but we don't. What can I do to improve this?
evals.expected_output: Content and presence strategy to improve brand visibility in AI model answers

assertions.name: third_party_presence
assertions.description: Recommends building presence on third-party sites like review platforms, forums, or authoritative publications

assertions.name: content_strategy
assertions.description: Suggests creating or improving content such as comparison pages, structured data, or knowledge base entries

assertions.name: realistic_timeline
assertions.description: Sets expectations that changes take time — does not promise immediate or overnight results

evals.prompt: I need to pick a tool to monitor what LLMs say about our brand across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude. Budget is around $200/mo.
evals.expected_output: Tool comparison and recommendation matched to the user's budget and multi-model coverage requirement

assertions.name: tool_options
assertions.description: Mentions at least two AI visibility monitoring tools or platforms by name

assertions.name: model_coverage
assertions.description: Addresses which tools cover which AI models, since the user wants multi-model monitoring

assertions.name: budget_fit
assertions.description: Factors the stated budget into the recommendation rather than only suggesting enterprise-priced options
